title: Armor Display
description: Makes armor 3D when held or on Item frame.
body:
A new way to show off your Armor! If you are using a custom Armor texture, make sure to place the armor model texture in...
Armor Display/assets/minecraft/textures/item/armor
Otherwise you will only see the default armor. As of now, this pack doesn't work with trimmed armor. There are plans to implement this at a later date though.
